provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, lean tall reptilian alien with mottled green-brown scales that provide natural camouflage, a narrow angular snout, a low flat crest ridge that does not catch light, amber eyes constantly scanning, a long dexterous tail, wearing light dark leather armor over a mottled green-brown undersuit designed to break up the silhouette, soft-soled boots shaped for digitigrade feet, a hooded cloak in dark mottled fabric, a short knife in a forearm sheath, a compact signal device on the wrist, scouts wear less armor because they need to move unseen
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval knight, human face, mammalian features, fur, hair, ears

judgment.explanation: Veshan faction. Forged material vocabulary with overlapping scales, dark bronze plate, leather underpadding. Martial culture expressed through gear.
